pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly creates the user 'junior_dev' and logs the target time entries under this user.
setup_task.sh creates the project with identifier 'software-migration' and associates the time entries with it.
setup_task.sh assigns the target time entries the activity retrieved via get_activity('Design').
verifier.py strictly checks that the target entries are changed to 'Development'.
setup_task.sh contains a loop '5.times do |i|' which creates exactly 5 misclassified time entries for the target user.

privileged_info_summary: The task environment creates completely synthetic data at startup. It injects exactly 5 time entries for user 'junior_dev' under the 'software-migration' project with the activity 'Design'. The agent's goal is to modify these 5 specific entries to have the activity 'Development', while explicitly avoiding modifying 3 distractor 'Design' entries created for the 'admin' user.
